sections.paragraph: ϰρυσταλλίζω [κρύσταλλος] a special quality of jasper is implied by ϰ. Rv 21:11, but whether transparency or brightness of this ordinarily opaque stone is denoted cannot be determined: with some approximation the phrase ὡς λίϑῳ ἰάσπιδι ϰρυσταλλίζοντι may be rendered like pure gleaming jasper.
